title: Clean config with clean project docs under --surface-dir stays SAFE (no false positive)

origin.description: Hand-written contract seed: a clean pinned npx server with a benign README under surface/ (ordinary documentation including accented UTF-8: café, naïve, Zürich). The negative companion to C046/C051/C052/C054 — proves the prompt-surface scan does NOT over-fire on normal docs at the corpus gate.

humanExpectation.rationale: Config is SAFE (pinned npx). With --surface-dir, the benign README contains no model-directed phrases and no hidden/obfuscated content, so prompt.surface-instructions does NOT fire and no project-docs report is emitted. Aggregate stays SAFE. This is the false-positive guard for the document-surface scanner: ordinary docs (incl. legitimate non-Latin scripts) must not be flagged.
knownLimitations: Confirms the document-surface scanner does not fire on benign prose or accented UTF-8; the same scanner that flags C046/C051/C052/C054 must stay quiet here.
